name: tech-advisory-board
description: Multi-agent advisory board for technical decisions — stack selection, architecture choices, framework/database comparisons, project planning. Champions debate, Advisors evaluate, Scout maps landscape. Backed by current web research via MCPs (perplexity, context7, brave-search).

telegram_bot_token.title: Telegram bot token (optional)
telegram_bot_token.description: Telegram Bot API token for the `channel` MCP server. Leave empty to disable Telegram delivery. When set, pair with telegram_chat_id. Read by servers/channel/index.js as TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN (legacy) or CLAUDE_PLUGIN_OPTION_telegram_bot_token.

telegram_chat_id.title: Telegram chat ID (optional)
telegram_chat_id.description: Destination chat ID for Telegram push (e.g. your numeric user ID or a group ID). Read as TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID (legacy) or CLAUDE_PLUGIN_OPTION_telegram_chat_id.

channel_webhook_url.title: Generic webhook URL (optional)
channel_webhook_url.description: Fallback destination for a generic JSON POST when Telegram is not configured or as an additional sink. Read as CHANNEL_WEBHOOK_URL (legacy) or CLAUDE_PLUGIN_OPTION_channel_webhook_url.

max_cost_per_session_usd.title: Max cost per session (USD)
max_cost_per_session_usd.description: Abort a TAB session if the estimated cost exceeds this threshold (USD). Overrides .tab/config.json budget.max_cost_per_session_usd.

warn_at_usd.title: Cost warning threshold (USD)
warn_at_usd.description: Emit a soft cost warning when session spend crosses this threshold (USD).

language_preference.title: Preferred output language
language_preference.description: Preferred output language as a BCP 47 tag (e.g. en, pt-BR). Used when the user's first message is ambiguous. Applies globally across all projects.

default_mode.title: Default session mode
default_mode.description: Mode used when the Moderator's complexity classification is ambiguous. One of Instant, Fast, Standard, Complete, Complete+. Leave unset to let the Moderator classify automatically.

auditor_enabled.title: Enable mandatory Auditor
auditor_enabled.description: When true (default), the Auditor subagent runs in Complete / Complete+ / Rechallenge modes. Set false to skip — requires an auditor_override_reason in .tab/config.json.

supervisor_gate_enabled.title: Enable Supervisor consensus-theater gate
supervisor_gate_enabled.description: When true (default), the Moderator invokes the Supervisor subagent if any of the four §12.1 consensus-theater triggers fire after the advisor phase. Set false to disable the gate.

adr_dir_override.title: ADR output directory override
adr_dir_override.description: Override the default .tab/decisions/ directory for generated ADRs. Absolute path or relative to the project root. Leave unset to use the default.

champion_model.title: Champion agent model override
champion_model.description: Override the model used by the Champion subagent. Defaults to claude-opus-4-7. Organizations with a tighter budget can pin sonnet via modelOverrides (e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-6'). Empty = use the agent default.

auditor_model.title: Auditor agent model override
auditor_model.description: Override the model used by the Auditor subagent. Defaults to claude-opus-4-7 with effort=xhigh. Downgrading to sonnet weakens adversarial verification — use with care.

advisor_model.title: Advisor agent model override
advisor_model.description: Override the model used by the Advisor subagents. Defaults to sonnet. Pinning opus raises cost meaningfully because N advisors run in parallel.

model_policy.title: Model selection policy
model_policy.description: How the Moderator picks a model for each subagent spawn. 'static' honors only the *_model knobs. 'budget-aware' downgrades Champion/Auditor toward Sonnet when <30% of the cost ceiling remains. 'context-aware' additionally reacts to cache-hit rate, MCP availability, novelty vs vanguard-timeline, and prompt-cache warmth (see skills/tab/references/model-policy.md).

model_policy_overrides.title: Per-mode model overrides
model_policy_overrides.description: Optional JSON object mapping canonical mode names to model IDs, e.g. {"Instant":"haiku","Fast":"sonnet","Complete":"opus"}. Applied after the policy engine; wins over the engine's recommendation. Empty string = no per-mode overrides.

strict_paths.title: Restrict automatic TAB activation to project directories
strict_paths.description: When true, the tab skill auto-activates only in directories containing a known project manifest (package.json, pyproject.toml, Cargo.toml, go.mod, pom.xml, Gemfile, composer.json, build.gradle). Manual invocation via /tech-advisory-board:tab always works. Default: false (preserves greenfield use, e.g. 'which stack for X?' in empty directories).

agent_team_mode.title: Execution mode for Complete / Complete+ cross-examination
agent_team_mode.description: Execution backend for parallel champion cross-examination in Complete/Complete+. Allowed values: 'subagents' (default, STABLE) = simulated fan-out via the Agent tool; 'agent_teams' = real multi-agent via Claude Code Agent Teams, which remains EXPERIMENTAL per Anthropic docs (requires CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS=1; ~2-3x base tokens; API may change between minor versions — pin your CC baseline); 'auto' = prefer Agent Teams when the env var is set, fall back to subagents silently otherwise. See skills/tab/references/agent-teams-mode.md.
